backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a portfolio backend, defining data types and CRUD operations for blog posts, projects, services, skills, leads, testimonials, SEO settings, and social links, with admin claim/check logic and blob storage/authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two high-confidence features: ensuring the actor is always initialized with the authenticated identity in useActor/useActorWrapper hooks, and fixing AdminGuard to reliably confirm admin status before rendering mutation controls.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short summaries describing each file's role, covering admin management pages, routing, hooks, and guard components with notes on specific bug fixes applied.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.) used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Boby Dhorajiya Portfolio' and mounting the app via the `/src/main.tsx` module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app file that configures TanStack Router with a public layout (nav/footer) and a lazy-loaded admin layout, registers all public and admin routes, and wraps the app in QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and Toaster providers.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks Internet Identity authentication and queries the backend for admin status (scoped by principal via React Query), showing loading/login UI or blocking access if the user is not an admin.
frontend/src/components/AdminSidebar.tsx: Renders the admin panel sidebar with navigation links, active-state highlighting, logout functionality, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu overlay.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays the site footer with branding, quick navigation links, contact info, and dynamic social links fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with the shared Navigation header and Footer, providing the base full-height flex layout for public pages.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, invalidating React Query caches on auth state changes.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop and mobile-responsive menus, highlighting the active route using the current pathname.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and optional email to create a profile on first login.
frontend/src/components/SEOHead.tsx: Headless component that updates the document title and meta description based on per-page SEO settings fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Icon button that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorWrapper.ts: Thin error-safe wrapper around useActor that returns a null actor fallback if actor initialization throws.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks (useQuery/useMutation) for all backend actor interactions including admin auth, user profiles, skills, projects, blog posts, and other portfolio data.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing fonts and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens (colors, sidebar, charts) and reusable component utility classes like glow effects and gradient text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Static About page displaying Boby Dhorajiya's bio, stats, core values, and a call-to-action, with an SEO head component and animated layout sections.
Admin page for managing blog posts with debounced search, pagination, and a dialog form for creating/editing posts including auto-slug generation from title.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CategoriesManag: Admin page for managing project categories with debounced search, pagination, and a dialog form for creating/editing categories with auto-slug generation from name.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard showing stat cards for projects, leads, and blog posts counts, plus navigation cards linking to all admin management sections.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Help.tsx: Admin help page rendering an accordion-based guide covering all admin panel sections such as projects, blog, SEO, social links, and admin access.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsManagement: Admin page for viewing and deleting contact leads, with debounced search filtering and pagination. Displays each lead's name, email, message, and timestamp in a card layout.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectsManagem: Admin page for full CRUD management of portfolio projects, supporting search, category filtering, pagination, and an image upload dialog for add/edit operations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SeoManagement.t: Admin page for managing per-page SEO settings (page slug, meta title, meta description) with debounced search, pagination, and an add/edit dialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServicesManagem: Admin page for creating, editing, and deleting services with a title and description, featuring debounced search filtering and paginated card display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SkillsManagemen: Admin page for managing skills with name, experience (years), and category fields, supporting CRUD operations via a dialog and debounced search with pagination.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SocialLinksMana: Admin page for managing social links (GitHub, LinkedIn, X) with CRUD operations, search, pagination, and a dialog form for creating/editing links including platform selection and toggle activation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsMan: Admin page for managing testimonials with debounced search, pagination, and a dialog form for creating/editing testimonial entries (author and message), using memoized card components for performance.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches and displays all blog posts using useGetBlogs, with loading/error/empty states and navigation to individual post pages.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPost.tsx: Individual blog post page that fetches a post by slug using useGetBlogBySlug and renders its title, date, and content with loading and not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a form (name, email, message) that submits via the `useProcessContactForm` mutation hook, displaying toast notifications on success or error, alongside static contact info (email, location, availability).
frontend/src/pages/Experience.tsx: Static Experience page displaying a single timeline entry for a Senior Mobile App Developer role at Nexus IT Solution (2022–Present), listing key responsibilities and achievements.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section, tech stack display, animated sections, social links fetched from the backend, and a static FAQ accordion.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: Simple 404 page displaying a 'Page Not Found' message with a link back to the home route.
frontend/src/pages/Projects.tsx: Projects page that fetches projects and categories from the backend, supports category filtering via tabs, and renders a responsive grid of project cards with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page that fetches services from the backend and falls back to a static list of seven predefined services if none are returned, rendered in a responsive grid with an SEO head component.
frontend/src/pages/Skills.tsx: Displays a grouped skills page fetching data via `useGetSkills`, rendering each skill category (primary, secondary, security, additional) in styled cards with progress bars and loading/error/empty states.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Public testimonials page that fetches and displays client reviews in a responsive grid with star ratings, quote styling, and loading/error/empty states.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color palette (cyan, navy, semantic tokens), custom font families, border radius, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording the current version, known 401 Unauthorized issue on POST mutations, existing feature fixes for actor authentication and AdminGuard, and a pending action request to audit backend admin authorization logic in main.mo.
